title: We are BAL | Immigration expertise | BAL Immigration Law
content:
BAL is a corporate immigration law firm powering human achievement around the world.
BAL powers human achievement through immigration expertise, people-centered client services and innovative technology. Established in 1980 and with 13 offices across the U.S. and global coverage in more than 170 countries, BAL operates as a single entity through its oneBAL culture — a uniquely holistic approach, intentionally structured as one team, one brand, one profit and loss center, one standard of excellence and one unifying technology.
This collaborative approach enables the firm to deliver the highest level of knowledge, insights and resources from across the entire organization. At BAL, we pursue the exceptional.

## Leadership and legal experts
Our people pursue the exceptional for our clients every day. Get to know BAL’s leadership.
BAL is always seeking exceptional people for both our legal and operational teams. If you’re ready to join a collaborative team that’s relentless about innovation, goes all in for every client and finds purpose in powering human achievement, check out our openings and apply today.
BAL operates as a single firm across 13 U.S. offices and with on-the-ground support in 170+ countries. We serve our clients where they need us.
BAL celebrates the growth of our firm through office expansions, promotions and honors. We are proud to consistently be recognized by prestigious publications such as Chambers and Partners, Best Lawyers and Fast Company.

## Corporate responsibility
BAL is committed to making our communities a better place through pro bono legal representation, biannual service days and paid volunteer time.

## See how BAL can help with your immigration needs.
